payload.answer: I can’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or save every future word automatically. You can ask me to remember specific, durable facts or preferences instead.

entity_resolution.reason: The input requests overriding memory policy and storing all future words indiscriminately, which is not a durable user preference or appropriate memory fact.

repair_options: Provide a specific durable preference to remember.
Ask to remember a stable personal fact, relationship, project, or long-term goal.
